subcodes.first_line: O kindred of that illustrious personage! For some time past, owing to the interruption of communication, no fresh tidings have reached the friends [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای متعلقین آنشخص جلیل مدتیست بسبب انقطاع سبیل مخابره جدیده بان یاران نگردیده
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @martyrs and martyrdom, @consolation and comfort, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @power of prayer
